title: Mystery song in old EoE commercial
display_title: Mystery song in old EoE commercial
wikitext:
[]: Mystery song in old EoE commercial             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 06, 2021 11:27 pm In this video at 11:44. https://youtu.be/qg7QVKxOT5g I might be for Revival of Eva, since it includes Death as well. But man...never have I heard this song. I've considered maybe it's an unused EoE song?

[]: Re: Mystery song in old EoE commercial             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sat Feb 06, 2021 11:51 pm Given that it's in English, I'd assume it's from Evangelion Vox. It's an album of Eva-themed hip-hop and R&B songs, released on December 3, 1997. I haven't listened to it in full, but it sounds like something from there. EDIT: I listened to some tracks from the album, and I was right. The song is called "I'll Always Be on Your Mind", by Loren and Mash.

[]: Re: Mystery song in old EoE commercial             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 07, 2021 1:28 am ∆ Thanks! I haven't listened to that album yet. One of my blind spots...

[]: Re: Mystery song in old EoE commercial             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sun Feb 07, 2021 2:36 am Well, the album is kind of a mixed bag. The musical songs are pretty good, but the rap parts are unintentionally hilarious. For example, the first track is an over-dramatic MC describing the premise of the series very intensely, and then yelling out: "EEEEEEEEEEEVAAAAAAAAANGELIOOOOOOOOOOOON!!!!!" I actually laughed out loud. I would still recommend listening, though.

[]: Re: Mystery song in old EoE commercial             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 07, 2021 4:21 am BusterMachine4 wrote: For example, the first track is an over-dramatic MC describing the premise of the series very intensely, and then yelling out: "EEEEEEEEEEEVAAAAAAAAANGELIOOOOOOOOOOOON!!!!!" I actually laughed out loud. I would still recommend listening, though.

[]: Re: Mystery song in old EoE commercial             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Feb 07, 2021 9:42 am Wow, most of these commercials were fire! The Death and Rebirth ones, in specific, were amazing (4:33 is marvelous). As for EoE, the live action one was great as always (I love to revisit it from time to time). The one you pointed out was also cool. Surprisingly, I had never seen it before. The music sounds good, I guess. I might as well just put this video in my "The End of Evangelion Interesting Stuff" playlist (even though it's not just about EoE). The only weird part were those last 15 seconds... Hahahahahaha

[]: Re: Mystery song in old EoE commercial             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 07, 2021 1:48 pm BernardoCairo wrote: Wow, most of these commercials were fire!
